name: Selsig Morgannwg (Glamorgan Sausages)
recipeInstructions:
1. Finely chop the onion.
2. Mix the bread crumbs, cheese, and chopped onion together.
3. Season to taste with salt, pepper, and dry mustard.
4. Beat 1 egg and 1 egg yolk in a separate bowl.
5. Add the beaten egg to the bread crumb mixture and mix until well combined.
6. In another bowl, beat the egg white separately.
7. Gently fold the egg white into the bread crumb mixture.
8. Shape the mixture into 12 sausages.
9. Roll each sausage in flour seasoned with salt and pepper.
10. Coat each sausage in beaten egg white and additional cheese raspings (small pieces of grated cheese).
11. Fry the sausages in hot fat or oil until golden brown.
